title: Set Of 4 Round Glitter Glass Mirror Candle Plate Stand | Silver Sparkle Candles Coaster Vanity Perfume Tray 15cm | Decorative Silver Glass Display Tray
features: SILVER CANDLE PLATES | This fabulous sparkly silver candle plate is great for displaying church pillar-style candles. The glitter effect adds a touch of glitz and glamour to any room

CANDLE COASTER | These versatile round candle plates are perfectly suitable for use as a pillar candle holder or to place underneath vases and flower displays. They also make fabulous plate coasters and trivets to jazz up your dining table

CANDLE CENTREPIECE | Our stunning silver glitter candle trays are ideal for weddings, parties and celebrations. Use as a table centrepiece with assorted size pillar candles or place beneath a flower arrangement to protect tables and add a touch of sparkle!

GLASS CANDLE STAND | Made from durable glass material. The mirror candle plate has pads on the bottom to prevent scratching your surfaces. The smooth glass plate design will stop unwanted wax and heat from coming into contact with your surfaces
CANDLE HOLDER PLATE DIMENSIONS | Measuring approximately 15cm across, this small silver candle plate is perfectly sized for a single pillar candle or small fish bowl floral vase
description: Round Glitter Glass Mirror Candle Plate Stand | Silver Sparkle Candles Coaster Vanity Perfume Tray 15cm | Decorative Silver Glass Display Tray Lovely round sparkly plates, each with a silver glitter mirror effect underneath the glass - perfect for adding something eye-catching at home or creating a very special look and feel at wedding events these silver candle plates are both practical and stunning SILVER CANDLE PLATES | This fabulous sparkly silver candle plate is great for displaying church pillar-style candles.
